evidence.exclusionReason: Historical-looking rows inside a current upstream snapshot may contain retrospective knowledge and are not independent as-of forecasts.

criteria.label: At least three independently frozen historical source cutoffs
At least one independent subsequent-outcome release
At least 30 resolved project outcomes after leakage checks

releaseDecision: Do not label forecast intervals calibrated or fit completion weights from this release. Preserve more historical cutoffs and independent outcomes first.
